name: AdvNav: Behavior-Guided Black-Box Adversarial Attacks on Vision-Language Navigation

description: arXiv:2607.11063v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Despite progress in Embodied AI, Vision-and-Language Navigation systems remain vulnerable to adversarial visual disturbances. Most existing methods rely on white-box access to target model gradients, which is often unrealistic for real-world deployed systems and computationally exhaustive due to recursive backpropagation for optimization, limi...
